title: Doormaker
move_pattern: Starts with Dramatic Open (one-time phase transition). Then cycles: Hunger → Scrutiny → Grasp → Hunger (repeating).
notes: The Doormaker begins combat disguised as a 'Door' with effectively infinite HP and no visible health bar. On its first turn (Dramatic Open), it reveals its true form — resetting HP to 512, removing all powers, and applying Hunger. Each move ends by swapping its active phase power (Hunger → Scrutiny → Grasp → Hunger), which cycles endlessly and acts as a visual indicator of the current mode. The Grasp move permanently weakens the player (-1 Strength and -1 Dexterity) while strengthening itself (+5 Strength) each cycle.
